claim: Owning a custom agent harness gives engineers control over agentic engineering results—the harness is the multiplier that determines what's possible
actionable: Build or customize your agent runtime rather than relying solely on default tools; create domain-specific harnesses for DevOps, testing, or billing use cases
source_title: Top #1 Opportunity for Senior Engineers: Agentic Engineering

claim: Software factories (automated systems that build features) compound output more effectively than individual feature engineering
actionable: Shift from building individual features to building factories of agents and code that produce on-spec results repeatedly; template your engineering patterns
source_title: Top #1 Opportunity for Senior Engineers: Agentic Engineering

claim: Extensible software (pluggable, easy-to-change architectures) is critical for agentic systems because models and tools change at light speed
actionable: Design software with open-to-extension, closed-to-modification principles; avoid cascading if-statements and rigid configurations that force rewrites
source_title: Top #1 Opportunity for Senior Engineers: Agentic Engineering

claim: Token maxing (high usage, low value) is the floor; only scaling value-generating tokens creates business moat—capture the arbitrage between token cost and value
actionable: Measure token ROI, not just token spend; ensure agents produce clear value before scaling to always-on; track the cost-to-revenue ratio
source_title: Top #1 Opportunity for Senior Engineers: Agentic Engineering

claim: Agents operate much faster than humans; bottlenecks come from giving agents incomplete API access, forcing them to reason about tasks they could automate
actionable: Audit API access for your agents; expose CLI tools, webhooks, and REST endpoints so agents don't waste tokens on retrieving information they could fetch directly
source_title: Top #1 Opportunity for Senior Engineers: Agentic Engineering

claim: The gap between top-performing and average agentic engineers with the same agent and token budget is widening weekly due to compounding advantage in these five pillars
actionable: Invest time in agent harness, software factories, extensible architecture, token arbitrage, and API access in parallel; do not master one at a time
source_title: Top #1 Opportunity for Senior Engineers: Agentic Engineering
